Package index

All functions

character_to_factor()
Changes the class of character columns to factor
common_names_survdat()
Format survdat to add common names
correlation_data()
Produces summary tables of correlations
correlation_summary()
Produces a summary table of correlations
create_coldpool_extent()
Create Cold Pool Extent
create_coldpool_index()
Create Cold Pool Index
create_coldpool_persistence()
Create Cold Pool Persistence
create_gsi()
Create Gulf stream Index
create_pp()
Create Primary Production Indicator
create_prop_sp_trips()
Create MRIP species recreational effort indicator
create_rec_trips()
Create MRIP total recreational trips indicator
create_sal()
Create Salinity Indicator
create_spatial_indicator()
Create Spatial Indicator
create_sst()
Create Sea Surface Temperature Indicator
create_stratified_mean()
Calculate Stratified Mean Biomass
create_swept_area()
Calculate Swept Area Biomass
create_total_rec_catch()
Create MRIP total recreational catch indicator
create_total_rec_landings()
Create MRIP recreational landings indicator
create_wcr()
Create Warm Core Rings
data_prep()
Prepares data for correlation analysis
data_summary()
Summarise survdat data
data_summary_5yr()
Summarise the past 5 years of survdat data
diet()
Create a table of diet data
find_files()
Locate files containing a text string
format_numbers()
Change the class of a vector to numeric
generate_len_plot()
A wrapper function to plot survdat length data
generate_len_table()
A wrapper function to summarise survdat length data
generate_plot()
A wrapper function to plot survdat data
generate_table()
A wrapper function to summarise survdat data
get_diet_plot()
Plot diet composition
get_diet_table()
Create a table of diet data
get_latlong()
Create a summary table of species range
get_len_data()
Format survdat length data
get_len_data2()
Format survdat length data for data table
get_len_data_risk()
Format survdat length data for risk analysis
get_len_data_tbl()
Format survdat length data for summary data table
get_var_data()
Format survdat data
`%>%`
Create Chlorophyll-a Indicator
len_tbl_data()
Summarise survdat length data
len_tbl_data_5yr()
Summarise the past 5 years of survdat length data
map_strata()
Create a map of seasonal species distribution
nc_to_raster()
Convert netcdf to raster
plot_age_density()
Plot survdat age density data
plot_age_diversity()
Plot survdat age diversity data
plot_asmt()
Plot assessmentdata::stockAssessmentData data
plot_climate_vulnerability()
Plot climate vulnerability ratings
plot_cond()
Plot species condition (weight/length^3)
plot_condition()
Plot Condition
plot_correlation()
Plots correlations between stock data and indicators
plot_depth()
Plot survdat depth data
plot_ecodata()
Plot stock-level data from ecodata
plot_len()
Plot minimum, mean, and maximum survdat length data
plot_len_hist()
Plot a density curve of survdat length data
plot_lw()
Plot a length-weight curve
plot_msy()
Plot B/Bmsy or F/Fmsy from assessmentdata::stockAssessmentSummary
plot_rec()
Plot recreational data
plot_relw()
Plot species relative weight
plot_swept()
Plot swept area estimates from survdat
plot_temp_depth()
Plot survdat temperature-at-depth data
plot_variable()
Plot survdat data
plt_indicator()
Plot indicator time series
pseudoR2()
Calculate a pseudo-R2 for Poisson regressions
rec_data_prep()
Prepare recreational data for plotting
render_indicator()
Renders an RMarkdown section
save_data()
Save a data set
species_condition()
Calculate Species Condition (weight/length^3)
species_range()
Calculate Species Range
status()
Assess the status of B/Bmsy or F/Fmsy from assessmentdata::stockAssessmentSummary

Developed by Abigail Tyrell, Stephanie Owen.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
